subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which We have sent down in truth for them that have quaffed the choice wine of utterance, when the All-Merciful came with manifest sovereignty. Verily, We make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق لمن شرب رحیق البیان اذ اتی الرحمن بسلطان مشهود انا نذکر
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
